description: Complete knowledge base management - create, organize, and maintain Obsidian-style knowledge notes with full lifecycle support

evals.expected_output: Creates knowledge/docker/concepts/docker-architecture.md with folder structure (concepts/guides/references/examples), proper frontmatter, all sections, and INDEX.md

evals.prompt: Find duplicates in my knowledge base
evals.expected_output: Scans knowledge/**/*.md, produces duplicate report grouped by HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW similarity, suggests actions

evals.prompt: Document how to set up CI/CD pipeline
evals.expected_output: Creates knowledge/<category>/guides/<topic>.md with guide type, folder structure, proper frontmatter

evals.prompt: Clean up overlapping notes about microservices
evals.expected_output: Identifies similar notes, proposes merge or link actions, NEVER auto-deletes

evals.prompt: Check for duplicates using the deduplicate script
evals.expected_output: Runs scripts/deduplicate.py, outputs JSON report with similarity scores

assertions.evidence: Each pair has title_score, content_score, tag_score

evals.prompt: Run deduplicate on knowledge/ and save report
evals.expected_output: Generates duplicate_report.md with HIGH/MEDIUM sections and recommendations
